completeness.title: Canonical Completeness Evaluation
completeness.rule: Canonical completeness is the average percent completion across canonical goals fields.
completeness.threshold: Missing = 0%; Partial = >0% and <100%; Complete = 100%; Strong = 100% with strong evidence.

manualGoals.title: Manual Goals Completeness Evaluation
manualGoals.subject: Manual Goals
manualGoals.rule: Manual Goals completeness = found required fields / total required fields.

requiredFields.label: Product intent
evidence: Product Thesis: Agent IDE makes repository understanding the primary developer interface for AI-ready developer handoffs.

requiredFields.label: Current focus
evidence: Current Focus: The repository is currently focused on making repository understanding the primary surface of Agent IDE.

requiredFields.label: Success criteria
evidence: Success Criteria: Control Plane reports repository handoff readiness as Ready.
Success Criteria: Canonical intelligence consistency has no avoidable contradictions or duplicate generated sections.

manualGoals.threshold: Missing = 0%; Partial = >0% and <100%; Complete = 100%; Strong = multiple evidence lines for every required field.
evidence: Product Thesis: Agent IDE makes repository understanding the primary developer interface for AI-ready developer handoffs.
Current Focus: The repository is currently focused on making repository understanding the primary surface of Agent IDE.
Success Criteria: Control Plane reports repository handoff readiness as Ready.
Success Criteria: Canonical intelligence consistency has no avoidable contradictions or duplicate generated sections.
Long-term vision missing
manualGoals.recommendation: Complete Manual Goals fields: Long-term vision.

canonicalCompleteness.rule: Completeness score comes from canonical goals field evaluation.

consistency.rule: Consistency checks compare thesis, focus, north star, validation confidence, evidence, duplicates, and contradictions.
evidence: .ai/goals.md
.ai/strategy.md
.ai/architecture.md
.ai/validation.md
.ai/repository-health.md

freshness.rule: Freshness deducts for stale intelligence documents.

confidence.rule: Confidence is derived from Repository Health, Strategy, and Validation confidence values.
evidence: .ai/repository-health.md
.ai/strategy.md
.ai/validation.md

verification.rule: Verification score is the percent of expected artifacts verified.

deductions.rule: strategy.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
architecture.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
backlog.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
validation.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
decisions.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
repository-health.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
context-package.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
intelligence-explanations.json: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
prompts/architect.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
prompts/builder.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
prompts/reviewer.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.
prompts/debugger.md: Artifact timestamp is older than refresh start.

recommendation.title: Why This Issue Was Selected
recommendation.rule: Select the highest deterministic priority issue that is actionable and backed by repository-local evidence.

candidateIssues.title: Complete Manual Repository Intent Notes
candidateIssues.evidence: Manual Goals Partial (75%). Missing: Long-term vision.

recommendation.recommendation: Complete only the incomplete Manual Goals fields in `.ai/goals.md`. Missing: Long-term vision.
